events.event: DeepEval reaches 14,200+ GitHub stars and 3M+ monthly downloads; DeepTeam reaches 1,400+ stars; 20M+ daily evaluations platform-wide
DeepEval v3.7 introduced multimodal test cases, GEPA/MIPROv2/COPRO/SIMBA prompt optimization algorithms, and Azure OpenAI support
Added Anthropic integration, CrewAI knowledge retrieval tracing, and ExactMatch/PatternMatch deterministic metrics
Shipped new agent evaluation metrics: Goal Accuracy, Topic Adherence, Plan Adherence with cooperative timeout budgeting
DeepEval v3.5 added PydanticAI agent wrapper, OpenAI Agents integration, and MCP evaluation support
Closed oversubscribed $2.2M seed round in 5 days with YC, Flex Capital, Liquid 2 Ventures, January Capital, and others
Created DeepTeam — open-source framework to red team LLMs with 50+ vulnerability tests and 20+ automated attack methods
Launch HN: Confident AI (YC W25) — presented the platform with Dataset Editor, Regression Catcher, and Iteration Insights
Introduced the DAG Metric — a deterministic, decision-tree-based evaluation method for structured LLM evaluation
Accepted into Y Combinator's Winter 2025 batch (YC W25)
Launched JudgementalGPT — an LLM agent purpose-built for evaluation tasks
DeepEval surpassed 5,000 GitHub stars and 600,000 monthly downloads
DeepEval v0.20 introduced LLM tracing with Confident AI platform integration
Co-founded Confident AI with Kritin Vongthongsri to build a cloud platform around DeepEval for enterprise LLM evaluation
Published first technical articles on LLM evaluation metrics and strategies on Medium and DEV Community
Created the DeepEval repository on GitHub — an open-source LLM evaluation framework ('Pytest for LLMs')
Moved to Microsoft AI, building document recommenders for Office 365
Joined Google as a Software Engineer scaling YouTube's creators studio infrastructure
Graduated from Imperial College London with a Bachelor's degree
